chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-2372 of 2025 ______________________________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) HEARING. 1. For orders on office objection No.1. 2. For hearing of main case. 07.07.2025. Mr. Hidayatullah Khan, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Haider Saleem, Addl. P.G ________________ After hearing Arguments at some length, learned counsel for the Petitioner submitted that he would be satisfied and would not press the instant constitutional petition if the directions are given to learned trial Court to conclude the trial within shortest possible time; this proposal was not opposed by the learned Additional P.G. by stating that process for establishing the Court are on the way and within 20 days Courts will be established. In view of the above, the instant C.P. is disposed of with directions to the learned trial Court to conclude the trial within 90 days. If any witness fails to appear, the trial Court is at liberty to issue process against them. JUDGE JUDGE Jamil
